parents.subject: LU-12553  mdc: polling mode for changelog reader

commit.subject: LU-00000 tests: perform tests on ppc64 client
commit.message:
LU-00000 tests: perform tests on ppc64 client

This patch is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientarch=ppc64 testlist=sanity

Change-Id: Ie5beb73e4b3a6d6e6318653566ac43b854ce16fc
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
